			"t_o":5.86258,
			"C_o":456.105,
			"a":3.41181e-07,
			"C_x":1e+06,
			"iter":10,
			"sei":0.127271,
			"ses":0.00385669,
			"r2":0.993267,
			"slope":0.341025,
			"domain":54,
			"n":55
			}
		]
	}
}
			}
	}
}
